questions.question: What does `useId()` (Vue 3.5+) provide when used for ARIA attributes?
options: A globally unique user session identifier
A unique ID per component instance to avoid duplicate IDs on reuse
An auto-incrementing integer for list items
A hashed class name for CSS modules

questions.question: When using `aria-live` for dynamic content, when should you use `assertive` instead of `polite`?
options: For all notifications to ensure they are always announced
When the content updates more than once per second
Only for urgent messages like errors, not general status updates
When the notification is visually hidden with `.sr-only`

questions.question: Why do SPAs need manual focus management on route changes?
options: Because Vue Router does not support the History API
Because Vue removes `tabindex` from elements on navigation
Because the browser's default behavior of moving focus to the page top does not fire
Because `nextTick` delays focus until the next microtask
